_comment: Device catalog. Single source of truth for the GUI: maps GUI kind → vendor + graphical type + short label + mgmt interface + optional exposed Web UIs. If the GUI kind does not match the Containerlab kind, set deploy_kind. To recognize non-standard Docker images, use image_patterns. To add a new device, add an entry to kinds with an already-known vendor and a type listed in icons (or add a new type + SVG). No JS changes required.
_palette_notes: Palette chosen to respect real brands where possible (Cisco cyan, Nokia navy, Juniper green, Huawei red, Arista red-orange, NVIDIA/Cumulus lime, Palo Alto orange, Extreme purple, HPE Aruba amber, Fortinet red, Checkpoint pink-magenta) and keep secondary vendors on hues that do not collide with primary vendors.
_webui_notes: The 'webui' field is a list of known ports exposed by the VD as web interfaces. The '🌐 Web UI' button in the context menu appears if (a) the kind has at least one entry here, or (b) the node has custom ports in extra.webui_ports. Each entry: {scheme: 'http'|'https', port: int, path: '/', label: 'J-Web'}.
